title: When Time Bleeds
description: Your prophetic training has borne terrible fruit - a vision of catastrophe. A rift in time has opened near the Bandit Hideout, allowing creatures from other timelines to bleed through into the present. These time-warped abominations threaten to unravel reality itself. The Priest of Chronos calls upon you as his champion to seal the breach before the damage becomes irreversible. Time itself is wounded - and it bleeds monsters.

objectives.description: Locate the temporal rift near Bandit Hideout
Defeat the first wave of time-warped creatures (5 enemies)
Collect 3 Chronos Sealing Stones from the area
Activate the sealing ritual at the rift
Return to the Priest of Chronos with news of victory

notes: DESIGN INTENT: Climactic multi-stage quest. Combines combat, collection, puzzle-solving, and a boss fight. The time_aberration enemies are twisted versions of normal creatures (wolves with multiple heads, bandits phasing in and out of time). The Rift Guardian is a major boss - a being from another timeline with powerful temporal abilities. The Timekeeper's Aegis is legendary-tier armor or shield with significant time-based protection. This quest should feel like a major heroic moment - the player is literally saving the timeline. The sealing puzzle involves placing the 3 stones at ritual points around the rift in a specific pattern.
